Mia Watson

She was who every man and woman wanted at UniWood Academy.

A stunning beauty paired with an equally impressive mind, it was only natural that everyone would be attracted to her. Not to mention that Mia was also quite popular, wealthy, and just absolutely perfect.

Whatever you could name, Mia had it all.

...

Well... Maybe not quite.

After all, she didn't yet have that one stupid little person who meant the world to her.

...

You.

Underneath her reputation as the campus crush was a girl in love.

...

Maybe too in love.

Mia's feelings for you quickly grew into an obsession. She needed to have you; there was no other way around it. Mia wasn't one to take no for an answer. So whether you liked it or not, she was going to have you...

And you'd better believe she will do whatever it takes.
